---
id: generic-project-file-show
title: "Get a specific generic project file"
description: "Retrieve data of a specific generic project file to check its attributes and optionally modify them with the [PATCH /apps/](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/generic-project-file/generic-project-file-update) endpoint. Read more in our [Retrieving a specific file's data](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#retrieving-a-specific-files-data) guide."
sidebar_label: "Get a specific generic project file"
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/bitrise-api/api-reference/bitrise-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a specific generic project file"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/generic-project-files/{generic-project-file-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve data of a specific generic project file to check its attributes and optionally modify them with the [PATCH /apps/](https://api-docs.bitrise.io/#/generic-project-file/generic-project-file-update) endpoint. Read more in our [Retrieving a specific file's data](https://devcenter.bitrise.io/api/managing-files-in-generic-file-storage/#retrieving-a-specific-files-data) guide.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./generic-project-file-show.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
